landing.heroTitle: Signage for your business — in 5 minutes, not 5 weeks
landing.heroSubtitle: Snap your storefront — we'll show you how the signage will look, estimate the cost, and collect bids from verified agencies in your city.
landing.trustNote: Demo: data stored locally, payments and contracts disabled
landing.step1Body: A phone snapshot is enough. No drawings or measurements to start.
landing.step2Body: In a second you see how the signage looks on your actual building.
landing.step3Body: You get 3–7 bids with price and ETA. You pick the best one.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps instead of two weeks of back-and-forth
landing.t1Body: I used to call 11 agencies — and still nobody showed up. Here I got 5 bids with portfolio photos in one evening. Picked the one with 4.9 rating.
landing.t2Body: We used to burn money on cold calls. Now we just check the marketplace in the morning and pick up 2–3 orders a week. Paid for itself in a month.
landing.t3Body: We opened 6 locations in a quarter — coordinating signage through AdvertMarket was way faster. The akimat-approval flow is a real bonus.
landing.faq1Q: How much does the platform cost for customers?
landing.faq1A: Free for customers. The platform takes a small commission from agencies on successful deals.
landing.faq2Q: What if none of the bids work for me?
landing.faq2A: Reject all of them and republish the order with adjusted requirements. You only pay once the final contract is agreed.
landing.faq3A: The agency that won the order. All agencies are verified and have a public rating and portfolio. The platform holds payment in escrow until installation is confirmed.
landing.faq4A: Depends on the city and signage type. For Almaty and Astana the platform tells you upfront whether approval is needed. Final responsibility lies with the executing agency.
landing.finalCtaBody: Upload a facade photo right now — you'll see the signage mockup in 5 seconds.

order.uploadHint: Drop your facade photo here or click to choose
order.publishedBody: Agencies in {city} were notified. Expect bids shortly.

marketplace.empty: No open orders yet. Check back later.
